title: Webapp entry token payload
description: Payload of the signed token in ?t= for webapp entry (before HMAC signature). Used by tgcarebot and webapp.

sub.description: Platform or external user id, e.g. tg:123456789

integratorUserId.description: Optional tgcarebot / integrator numeric user id (stringified) for webapp-side canon lookup before creating a new platform_users row.

bindings.description: Channel bindings. Known keys: telegramId, maxId, vkId (string values). At least one may be present when user enters from a messenger.
